{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Source<br>Skills<br>Relic Resonance<br>Categories}}

{{CargoRelic
|name=Babylonian Incantation Bowl
|class_id=21296
|rank=AAA
|affct=FTH
|source=
|description=This is a pottery artifact from ancient Babylonian civilization, also known as a demon trap bowl, an early form of protective magic, found in present-day Iraq and Iran. The bowl is typically inscribed in a spiral pattern, moving from the edge to the center. It was commonly used in religious ceremonies to pray for protection, health, or exorcism. These incantation bowls often feature inscriptions of spells and the names of deities, seeking the protection of supernatural powers.
|fame=38
|art=52
|fth=75
|civ=29
|tech=49
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
